title: Google BigQuery access denied due to IP blocking
symptom: When trying to authorize the Google BigQuery node, a '403 Forbidden' error is returned, indicating permission issues. The same workflow works in the cloud version but fails in the self-hosted instance.
root_cause: Google has blocked access from certain IP addresses associated with Hetzner, leading to authorization failures for services like BigQuery. This is a known issue affecting multiple users with similar setups.
fix_steps: Alternatively, migrate your N8N instance to a different hosting provider like AWS
agent_instruction: Disable IPv6 and reserve a floating IPv4 address or migrate to a different hosting provider.
